keyPointsSummary: Want/Wants for present desire, Wanted for past desire
Let + person + base verb for permission; Let's for suggestions including yourself
Would like to is the polite version of want to
Can = ability/permission, Should = advice, May = possibility/formal permission, Must = strong obligation

quickQuiz.answer: I would like to meet you.

quickQuiz.hindi: क्या मैं अंदर आ सकता हूँ?
हमें नियमों का पालन करना चाहिए।
वह एक नई नौकरी चाहता है।

mustRememberRules: Want/Wants for present desire, Wanted for past desire

Can = ability/permission, Should = advice, May = possibility/formal permission, Must = strong obligation
